Its like the curl command is hanging at 3 second mark of the for loop:
sleep 2
14:36:37 ++ sleep 2
14:36:39 ++ for i in '{1..10}'
14:36:39 ++ curl -sS 10.250.0.1:6969
16:05:52 Build timed out (after 90 minutes). Marking the build as failed.

Patch Set 1:

Gary, any idea why our CSIT are all of sudden hanging in curl?? Would global-jjb changes affect it?
